data.title: Skycap Investment Holdings Transitions to Investment Issuer with CSE Approval
data.description:
Li-Metal Corp ( (TSE:LIM) ) has issued an update.

Skycap Investment Holdings Inc., formerly known as Li-Metal Corp., has received approval from shareholders and the Canadian Securities Exchange to transition its business classification from an industrial issuer to an investment issuer. This strategic shift, accompanied by a rebranding to Skycap, positions the company to explore and invest in a broader array of high-potential industries, aiming to deliver sustainable value through prudent capital deployment. The transition aligns with the company’s long-term vision and enhances its ability to adapt to the evolving market landscape, promising meaningful returns for stakeholders.

More about Li-Metal Corp

Skycap is a Canadian-based investment issuer focused on identifying and investing in high-growth sectors. Leveraging its financial resources and market expertise, Skycap aims to deliver sustainable value to its stakeholders through strategic and diversified investments.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$9.56M

Learn more about LIM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Crypto Company Delays 10-K Filing
data.description:
Crypto Company ( (CRCW) ) has released a notification of late filing.

The Crypto Company has announced a delay in filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The primary reasons for the delay include limited resources in financial reporting and accounting personnel, necessitating additional time to close its books and ensure adequate disclosure. The company anticipates filing the report within the 15-day extension period provided under Rule 12b-25. No significant changes in financial results are expected, and the company remains committed to compliance with all regulatory requirements. The notification was signed by Ron Levy, the Chief Executive Officer.

More about Crypto Company

Current Market Cap: $1.81M

Find detailed analytics on CRCW stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Goldgroup Completes CAD $7.77 Million Private Placement
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Goldgroup Mining ( (TSE:GGA) ).

Goldgroup Mining Inc. announced the final close of its non-brokered private placement, raising approximately CAD $7.77 million. The funds will be used for improvements at the Cerro Prieto mine, updating the Pinos Project’s economic assessment, debt reduction, and general working capital. This move is expected to strengthen Goldgroup’s operational capabilities and market position, pending final approval from the TSX Venture Exchange.

More about Goldgroup Mining

Goldgroup Mining Inc. is a Canadian-based mining company that owns and operates the Cerro Prieto heap-leach gold mine in Sonora, Mexico. The company is led by a team with extensive expertise in mine development, corporate finance, and exploration in Mexico.

Average Trading Volume: 336,424

data.title: Golden Ocean Group Appoints New Directors to Enhance Leadership
data.description:
An update from Golden Ocean Group ( (GOGL) ) is now available.

Golden Ocean Group Limited has announced the appointment of Carl Erik Steen and James Ayers as new directors. Steen brings extensive experience in shipping and banking, having held significant roles at Nordea bank and Christiania Bank. Ayers, who has been with the company since 2018, has a strong background in maritime and offshore energy sectors, and has held leadership roles at Front Ocean Management and Frontline Ltd. These appointments are expected to strengthen the company’s leadership team with their diverse expertise.

More about Golden Ocean Group

data.title: Mynaric AG Announces Resignation of Supervisory Board Chairman
data.description:
An announcement from Mynaric AG ( (DE:M0YN) ) is now available.

On March 28, 2025, Mynaric AG announced the resignation of Bulent Altan as Chairman and Member of its Supervisory Board, effective April 1, 2025, due to personal reasons. Altan had been elected as Chairman following his appointment to the Supervisory Board in August 2023. The company plans to elect a new Chairman promptly and will appoint a new member in accordance with the applicable stock corporation act. This change in leadership is significant for Mynaric as it navigates its strategic direction in the laser communications industry, potentially impacting its stakeholders and market positioning.

More about Mynaric AG

Mynaric AG is at the forefront of the industrial revolution in laser communications, specializing in the production of optical communications terminals for air, space, and mobile applications. The company provides laser communication networks that enable ultra-high data rates and secure, long-distance data transmission between moving objects for various applications, including wireless terrestrial, mobility, airborne, and space-based uses. Mynaric is headquartered in Munich, Germany, with additional locations in Los Angeles, California, and Washington, D.C.

YTD Price Performance: -34.15%

Average Trading Volume: 1,870

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $4.98M

See more insights into M0YN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Vision Marine Technologies Faces Lawsuit Over Stock Conversion
data.description:
The latest update is out from Vision Marine Technologies ( (VMAR) ).

Vision Marine Technologies Inc., a company involved in marine technology, is facing a lawsuit filed on March 6, 2025, in New York state courts. The lawsuit alleges that the company improperly converted shares of its Series A preferred stock in December 2024, adjusting the conversion price from $0.30 to $40.50 due to reverse stock splits. Plaintiffs claim the conversion price should have been $1.23 and are seeking approximately 1,016,000 common shares and $2.0 million in damages. Vision Marine Technologies disputes these claims and is prepared to defend itself.

More about Vision Marine Technologies

YTD Price Performance: -62.38%

Average Trading Volume: 5,620,019

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $5.55M

data.title: Russel Metals Secures $300 Million Through Note Offering
data.description:
Russel Metals ( (TSE:RUS) ) has issued an announcement.

Russel Metals Inc. has successfully closed a $300 million offering of senior unsecured notes, rated BBB (low) with a stable trend by DBRS Limited. The proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes, potentially enhancing the company’s financial flexibility and supporting its operations across North America.

More about Russel Metals

Russel Metals is one of the largest metals distribution companies in North America, focusing on value-added processing. It operates in three segments: metals service centers, energy field stores, and steel distributors. The company offers a wide range of metal products, including carbon steel, stainless steel, aluminum, and other non-ferrous metals, catering to the energy industry and large equipment manufacturers.

data.title: Biophytis Completes €2.6 Million Private Placement
data.description:
An update from Biophytis SA ( (FR:ALBPS) ) is now available.

Biophytis SA has completed the settlement and delivery of a private placement valued at approximately 2.6 million euros. This financial maneuver involved the issuance of new ordinary shares and pre-funded warrants, which have been admitted to trading on Euronext Growth. The successful placement, facilitated by Maxim Group LLC and Invest Securities, is expected to enhance Biophytis’s financial position, potentially impacting its operations and market strategy in developing treatments for age-related diseases.

More about Biophytis SA

Biophytis SA is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing treatments for age-related diseases. The company operates in the biotechnology industry and is listed on Euronext Growth Paris.

data.title: Legacy Education Inc. Amends Executive Employment Agreements
data.description:
Legacy Education Inc. ( (LGCY) ) has provided an update.

On March 28, 2025, Legacy Education Inc. announced amendments to the employment agreements of its CEO, LeeAnn Rohmann, and CFO, Brandon Pope. Ms. Rohmann’s salary was increased to $415,000, with potential payouts tied to company performance. Mr. Pope’s agreement includes a $300,000 base salary and potential annual bonuses, with terms for severance and equity vesting upon certain types of termination.

data.title: Reliance Infrastructure Completes Redemption of Non-Convertible Debentures
data.description:
Reliance Infrastructure Limited ( (IN:RELINFRA) ) has shared an announcement.

Reliance Infrastructure Limited announced the redemption and extinguishment of its Non-Convertible Debentures (Series 20E), following a settlement agreement with IDBI Trusteeship Services Limited. This action results in the withdrawal of enforcement actions previously initiated by the Debenture Trustee under SERFAESI, marking a significant step in the company’s financial restructuring efforts and potentially enhancing its financial stability and market confidence.

More about Reliance Infrastructure Limited

Reliance Infrastructure Limited operates in the infrastructure sector, focusing on the development, implementation, and operation of projects in power, roads, metro rail, and other infrastructure areas. The company is a part of the Reliance Group and is involved in various infrastructure projects across India.
